'''thazacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oofbird|oofbird]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oofbird|oofbird]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thazacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzæchæth|thæzæchæth]] || [[word:thæzæchæj|thæzæchæj]] || [[word:thæzæchæsh|thæzæchæsh]] || [[word:thæzæchæ|thæzæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazazachath|thazazachath]] || [[word:thazazachaj|thazazachaj]] || [[word:thazazachash|thazazachash]] || [[word:thazazacha|thazazacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazachath|thazachath]] || [[word:thazachaj|thazachaj]] || [[word:thazachash|thazachash]] || [[word:thazacha|thazacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazafchath|thazafchath]] || [[word:thazafchaj|thazafchaj]] || [[word:thazafchash|thazafchash]] || [[word:thazafchaf|thazafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazachatha|thazachatha]] || [[word:thazachaja|thazachaja]] || [[word:thazachasha|thazachasha]] || [[word:thazachaka|thazachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazachath|thazachath]] || [[word:thazachaj|thazachaj]] || [[word:thazachash|thazachash]] || [[word:thazacha|thazacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazachathal|thazachathal]] || [[word:thazachajal|thazachajal]] || [[word:thazachashal|thazachashal]] || [[word:thazachakal|thazachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazachathatha|thazachathatha]] || [[word:thazachajaja|thazachajaja]] || [[word:thazachashasha|thazachashasha]] || [[word:thazachaka|thazachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazachathan|thazachathan]] || [[word:thazachajan|thazachajan]] || [[word:thazachashan|thazachashan]] || [[word:thazachakan|thazachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazachathaoro|thazachathaoro]] || [[word:thazachajaoro|thazachajaoro]] || [[word:thazachashaoro|thazachashaoro]] || [[word:thazachakaoro|thazachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
